'''Neshtab''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of snowy [[Water/Legends|ice]] plains<ref name="YodaStories" /> located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" />

During the [[Waymancy Storm]] of [[7811 BBY]], the Neshtabine nest was associated with the [[Waymancy Hollow]], fighting against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was eventually [[Rout on Tantara|routed]] by the [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic Rocket-Jumpers]] at [[Tantara]].<ref name="AC4" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] factory on Neshtab was creating [[stormtrooper droid]]s until it was destroyed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. There were snow [[Farm/Legends|farms]] on the planet utilizing environmentally controlled greenhouses to grow plants.<ref name="YodaStories" />
{{Noncanonend}}

[[8t88/Legends|8t88]], with a [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] head, was later spotted on Neshtab after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="KKT4">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale4|series=Kyle Katarn's Tale|text=Mission 4}}</ref>
